name: Blue Ribbon Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together shortening and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add eggs; beat for 2 minutes.
3. Add mashed bananas; beat for 2 minutes.
4. Sift dry ingredients together; add to creamed mixture along with buttermilk and vanilla. Beat for 2 more minutes.
5. Stir in chopped pecans.
6. Pour batter into 2 greased and floured 9-inch round layer cake pans.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes.
8. Cool layers.
9. Fill and frost as desired (using Creamy Nut Filling and White Snow Frosting).
